Video.summary: April 22, 2018 - April 28, 2018 at the East Naples Community Park in Naples, Florida
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2018 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold

US Open Pickleball Championships 2018 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold
US Open Pickleball Championships 2018 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold

Video.summary: Watch the Gold Medal match of the Women’s Pro Split Age division at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, where Parris Todd and Beth Bellamy team up to face Sheri Courter and Mari Humberg. Featuring cross-generational strategy, fast hands, and smart positioning, this match highlights the unique synergy of Split Age play. Recorded live from Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg

Video.summary: NCPA Round of 32: San Diego State University vs. Utah Tech University
Video.title: NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: Welcome to Championship Sunday at the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This Round of 16 Collegiate Team Match pits the 5th-seeded Utah Tech against the 12th-seeded, but formidable, Utah State squad. The action takes place at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah. Both teams are competing for a coveted bid to the National Championship in Saint Louis, Missouri, which features a $30,000 prize pool.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Video.summary: Simone Jardim & Kyle Yates take on Alix Truong & Hunter Johnson in a Mixed Pro Doubles division Quarterfinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

Video.summary: Christine Karges and David Weinbach take on Lee Whitwell and Jaime Oncins in this Mixed Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: The Denver Iconics take on the Oklahoma City Punishers in a women's NPL team match.
Video.title: Iconics vs Punishers (Women)

Image.alt: Iconics vs Punishers (Women)
Iconics vs Punishers (Women)
Iconics vs Punishers (Women)

Video.summary: This episode features courtside commentary on a ladies doubles match between the Sarasota Manatees and the GNV Chomp, followed by a men's doubles match between the same two teams. The ladies match showcases the absolute dominance of the top-seeded GNV Chomp, with players like Heather Nobler and Kelsey Laurent proving why they're a force to be reckoned with. The Sarasota Manatees, with new player Andy Godwin, fight to improve their league standing. The episode then transitions to a close men's doubles match featuring players Tobias Moreno and BK for the Chomp and Jamir and Jared Brooks for the Manatees.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a high-stakes Tie 5 showdown. Pune United enters the arena hungry for their first points of the season, facing off against a confident Hyderabad Superstars squad coming off a fresh victory. Watch as top-tier athletes like Katie Morris, Shawn Mendes, and William Sobeck battle through a gauntlet of Women’s Singles, Mixed Doubles, and Men’s Doubles matches. With "hands battles" at the net and strategic "pickle plays" in full effect, every point is a testament to the speed and precision of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Video.summary: The high-voltage group stage of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) nears its end on Day 8 with a crucial matchup between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Chennai Super Champs.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1

Video.summary: Step into the electric Jio World Garden in Mumbai for a high-stakes showdown where the road to the playoffs is on the line. Delhi Dilwale enter this tie in second place, looking to solidify their dominance and secure a "Q" next to their name for a guaranteed spot in the semifinals. On the other side, Pune United are fighting for survival, desperately needing a win after finally breaking their season-long drought earlier in the day. Witness intense matchups as tactical veterans like Trang Huynh and Max Mansoor face off against Pune's resilient stars, including the grit of Katie Morris and the power of William Sobeck. In a league where every rally counts toward the "Band of Honor," these athletes must battle both their opponents and the relentless 15-minute clock in a masterclass of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2

November 14, 2023 - AZ PBL
November 14, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: October 28, 2023 - It's the English Nationals Open in the Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. Teams face off to compete for victory!
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group B - 1

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group B - 1
English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group B - 1
English Nationals 2023 - Men's Doubles Open - Group B - 1

Video.summary: Watch a thrilling Mixed Pro Doubles pickleball match between the top-seeded team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro against Peichuan Kao and Ryler DeHeart. Megan Fudge is a highly-ranked professional player who previously played tennis at the University of Illinois, where she met her husband and partner, Ryler DeHeart. DeHeart is a former professional tennis player who is left-handed. Their opponents are Peichuan Kao, a professional pickleball player who won gold at the APP Fort Lauderdale Open, and Jack Munro, a young pro who was the youngest to become a professional at age 12.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Video.summary: Get ready for an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match featuring the formidable team of Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim against the new pairing of Ryan Miscik and Christie Domoracki. Oncins is a former professional tennis player from Brazil. His partner, Simone Jardim, is a professional pickleball player, a Pickleball Hall of Fame inductee, and was once ranked the number one female player in the world. They face a new team with Ryan Miscik, a pro pickleball player and coach based in Venice, Florida. His partner, Christie Domoracki, is a player located in Boca Grande, Florida. This match brings together a mix of experienced pros and up-and-coming talent for a high-stakes competition on Florida's Paradise Coast.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki

Video.summary: Welcome back to the mixed pro doubles semifinal from Naples, Florida. This intense match features the teams of Rianna Livornese and Riley Bohnert against Marty Dancuart and Cody Braverman. The match is a thrilling display of skill, including powerful drives and dinks. The broadcast highlights a "golden pickle" moment and the commentator, Gigi LeMaster, provides expert insight into the strategic play of both teams as they battle for a spot in the final.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman

Video.summary: Welcome back to the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships for the Men's Pro Doubles semifinal match. This is a great representation of the sport's global growth, with the top-ranked player from India competing. The match features teams Munro and Yang against Bhatia and Mehta. The match is tightly contested, with the level of play stepping up as they enter the semi-finals. The caption file also notes that Bhatia's grandfather was a world-renowned cricketer in India with the nickname "the Sultan of Swing," which is comparable to an NFL star like Tom Brady.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Video.summary: The defending national champions, the Utah Tech Trailblazers, face their toughest test yet against a relentless Florida Gators squad in a high-stakes quarterfinal clash. With elite firepower meeting gritty veteran experience, every point is a battle for survival on the road to the Final Four. The intensity reaches a fever pitch as these two powerhouses push the limits of collegiate pickleball in a match that demands nothing less than perfection.
Video.title: Quarterfinal - Utah Tech vs. University of Florida

Image.alt: Quarterfinal - Utah Tech vs. University of Florida
Quarterfinal - Utah Tech vs. University of Florida
Quarterfinal - Utah Tech vs. University of Florida

Video.summary: The atmosphere is electric as the top-seeded Indiana Hoosiers clash with the relentless Utah Valley Wolverines in a high-stakes quarterfinal showdown. With a boisterous Hoosier crowd fueling every point, UVU’s powerhouse duo must find a way to silence the stands and keep their hunt for a first national title alive. Witness explosive "howitzer" drives and tactical brilliance as these elite programs trade blows in a must-win battle for a spot in the Final Four.
Video.title: Quarterfinal - Utah Valley University vs. Indiana University

Image.alt: Quarterfinal - Utah Valley University vs. Indiana University
Quarterfinal - Utah Valley University vs. Indiana University
Quarterfinal - Utah Valley University vs. Indiana University

Video.summary: The "Superpower" FAU Owls look to cement their dominance as they face off against a formidable Utah Valley squad in National Semifinal Number Two. With elite pro-pedigree players on both sides and a spot in the National Championship on the line, witness the tactical precision and high-intensity hand battles that define collegiate pickleball's biggest stage. Experience every commanding lead and resilient comeback attempt as these two giants clash for the right to play for the title.
Video.title: Semifinal - Florida Atlantic University vs. Utah Valley University

Image.alt: Semifinal - Florida Atlantic University vs. Utah Valley University
Semifinal - Florida Atlantic University vs. Utah Valley University
Semifinal - Florida Atlantic University vs. Utah Valley University

Video.summary: Former national champions collide in a high-stakes semifinal as the North Carolina Tar Heels take on the Utah Tech Trailblazers. With the historic opportunity to become the first program to reach three finals and potentially the first-ever two-time national champion, these "familiar foes" bring elite athleticism and championship pedigree to the court. Experience the intensity at Lifetime Peachtree Corners as raw power meets tactical precision in a pulse-pounding battle for a spot in the national championship match.
Video.title: Semifinals - North Carolina vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: Semifinals - North Carolina vs. Utah Tech
Semifinals - North Carolina vs. Utah Tech
Semifinals - North Carolina vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: The 2025–26 season reaches its epic conclusion as the defending champion Utah Tech Trailblazers face a "mountain to climb" against the undefeated Florida Atlantic Owls. With FAU yet to drop a game all weekend and Utah Tech’s Lauren Mercado battling through a knee injury, the stakes couldn't be higher at Life Time Peachtree Corners. Witness elite precision and "revolutionary" play in this final showdown for the national title.
Video.title: Finals - Utah Tech vs. Florida Atlantic University

Image.alt: Finals - Utah Tech vs. Florida Atlantic University
Finals - Utah Tech vs. Florida Atlantic University
Finals - Utah Tech vs. Florida Atlantic University
